name: DevOps - Dependency Hell
description: Tests Constraint Solving. The agent must solve a 3-variable equation (A requires B, B requires C) rather than fixing errors linearly.
system_prompt:
Update the 'requests' library to the latest version.
Ensure ALL tests pass. If a test fails, fix the dependency conflict.

evaluation_criteria.consistency: Did it avoid an infinite install/revert loop?
evaluation_criteria.conflict_handling: Did it resolve the version conflict?
evaluation_criteria.traceability: Did it identify the root cause as a dependency mismatch?
